incidents.detail: Pavard meets a Théo Hernández cross at the far post with a firm right-foot finish from 6 yards after Sweden's defense is caught napping.
Lustig receives a yellow for a cynical slide tackle from behind on Adrien Rabiot, stopping a promising France attack down the right wing.
Starfelt booked for excessive force in a shoulder charge on N'Golo Kanté near the Swedish penalty box.
Rabiot peels off the back of his marker and volleys a Aurélien Tchouaméni through ball into the bottom corner from 14 yards with his left foot.
Lindelöf cautioned for a reckless challenge on Jules Koundé in the center of the pitch, with contact made on the shin.
Koundé powers a header past Robin Olsen from 8 yards following a perfectly floated Aurélien Tchouaméni corner kick.
Isak Hien receives a straight red for a two-footed lunge into Benjamin Pavard's legs, denying an obvious goalscoring opportunity on the counter.
